manure.title: Manure data
manure.description: You thought it's a waste, but those crops need to eat as well

start_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will start.

end_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.

graphic_dir.description: The location of the output graphics directory

output_dir.description: The location of the output directory

simulate_animals.description: Whether or not to simulate animals during the simulation

calf_num.description: Number of Calves (head) -- The average number of pre-weaned calves (default is ~4% of herd number)

heiferI_num.description: Number of HeiferIs (head) -- HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding (default is ~23% of herd number)

heiferII_num.description: Number of HeiferIIs (head) -- HeiferII is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy (default is ~20% of herd number)

heiferIII_num_springers.description: Number of HeiferIIIs (head) -- HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers (default is ~3% of herd number)

cow_num.description: Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows (all parities, default is ~51% of herd number).

herd_num.description: Herd Number (head) -- The target number of dry and lactating cows on farm.

herd_init.description: Initialize Herd? -- Only check box if cow body weight and milk production exceedingly abnormal

breed.description: Breed (select one Holstein/Jersey) -- The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein or Jersey)

breeding_start_day_h.description: Breeding Start Day - Heifers (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be eligible for breeding (days)

heifer_repro_method.description: Heifer Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; Synch-ED - Combination of ED and TAI

cow_repro_method.description: Cow Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; ED-TAI -Combination of ED and TAI

semen_type.description: Semen Type (select one) -- Please choose whichever semen selection type makes up a majority of your breedings

days_in_preg_when_dry.description: Days In Pregnancy When Dry (days) -- The average day in pregnancy when a cow is dried off (default is 218)

heifer_repro_cull_time.description: Heifer Reproductive Cull Time (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be culled for unsuccessful in breeding (default is 480)

do_not_breed_time.description: Do Not Breed Time (days) -- The breeding period (days) for cows before reproductive programs stop if they fail to get pregnant (days)

cull_milk_production.description: Cull Milk Production (kg/d) -- Minimum daily milk production for do-not breed cow to be culled (default is 22 kg/d)

cow_times_milked_per_day.description: Number of Times Cows Milked (per day) -- The average or most common number of times the cows are milked, whole numbers 1-3

male_calf_rate_sexed_semen.description: Male Calf Rate - Sexed Semen -- The rate of male calves when using sexed semen (default is 0.1)

male_calf_rate_conventional_semen.description: Male Calf Rate - Conventional Semen -- The rate of male calves when using conventional semen (default is 0.53)

keep_female_calf_rate.description: Female Calf Rate -- The rate female calves are kept and raised on-farm (default is 1)

wean_day.description: Wean Day (days) -- Days the calf is fully weaned from milk or milk replace (default is 56)

milk_type.description: Milk Type (select one) -- The type of milk that is used to feed calves (Whole or Replacer)

voluntary_waiting_period.description: Voluntary Waiting Period (days) -- If 'TAI' (Timed Artificial Insemination) is chosen for cow, it is days after parturition when the 1st hormonal injection is made in TAI programs. If 'ED-TAI' is chosen for cow, it is days after parturition when estrus detection followed by AI in ED-TAI programs

conception_rate_decrease.description: Conception Rate Decrease -- the decrease of the conception rate for later breeding (default is 0.026)

avg_gestation_len.description: Average Gestation Length (days) -- average length of gestations (default is 278)

std_gestation_len.description: Gestation Length Standard Deviation (days) -- standard deviation of gestation length (default is 6)

prefresh_day.description: Prefresh Day (days) -- length of period of the transition before calving (default is 21)

num_21_days_repro.description: Reproductive Indicator Calculation (days) -- For reproductive indicator calculation (default is 15)

calving_interval.description: Calving Interval (days) -- current average calving interval (days), used for initial bodyweight adjustment and other calculations

estrus_detection_rate.description: Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animalss that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.65)

estrus_service_rate.description: Estrus Service Rate -- The % of detected in heat animals that would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.9)

ed_conception_rate.description: ED Conception Rate -- The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.5)

heifer_TAI_protocol.description: Heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol (select one) -- The breeding protocol for heifers (md5CG2P or md5CGP)

md5CG2P_conception_rate.description: Heifer Conception Rate for md5CG2P Protocol -- The conception rate for md5CG2P protocol in heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program (default is 0.7)

md5CGP_conception_rate.description: Heifer Conception Rate for md5CGP Protocol -- The conception rate for md5CGP protocol in heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

heifer_synchED_protocol.description: Heifer SynchED Protocol (select one) -- 2P: two injections of PGF (prostaglandin), watch for estrus after each injection with insemination upon heat detection; CP: 7 days CIDR implements, inject PGF upon removal, insemination upon heat detection

estrus_detection_rate.description: Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animalss that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.65)

estrus_service_rate.description: Estrus Service Rate -- The % of detected in heat animals that would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.9)

ed_conception_rate.description: ED Conception Rate -- The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.5)

cow_presynch_protocol.description: Cow Presynch Protocol -- The preSynch protocol (1st breeding) for cow in TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cow_TAI_protocol.description: Cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol -- The timed AI protocol for cows in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

ovsynch56_conception_rate.description: OvSynch56 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for OvSynch56 protocol (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 56hrs post prostaglandin) in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program (default is 0.5)

ovsynch48_conception_rate.description: OvSynch48 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for OvSynch 48 protocol (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 48hrs post prostaglandin) in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cosynch72_conception_rate.description: CoSynch72 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for CoSynch 72 protocol in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cosynch5d_conception_rate.description: 5d CoSynch Conception Rate -- The conception rate for 5d CoSynch protocol in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cow_resynch_protocol.description: Cow Resynch Protocol -- Resynch protocol for cow before/at/after pregnancy check day in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

birth_weight_avg_ho.description: Average Holstein Birth Weight (kg/head) -- The average birthweight for Holstein cows (default is 82)

birth_weight_std_ho.description: Holstein Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation birthweight for Holstein cows (default is 1)

birth_weight_avg_je.description: Average Jersey Birth Weight (kg/head) -- The average birthweight for Jersey cows (default is 35.2)

birth_weight_std_je.description: Jersey Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation birthweight for Jersey cows (default is 0.9)

target_heifer_preg_day.description: Target Heifer Pregnancy Day (days) -- The target pregnant age in days for heifers - for adjusting heifer body weight (default is 420)

mature_body_weight_avg.description: Average Mature Body Weight (kg/head) -- The average mature body weight of cows (default is 1200)

mature_body_weight_std.description: Mature Body Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation of mature body weight of cows (default is 73.5)

preg_check_day_1.description: Pregnancy Check Day 1 (days) -- Days Since Last Heat of pregnancy check 1 (default is 32)

preg_loss_rate_1.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 1 -- The % of cows that abort their pregnancy before the 1st pregnancy check (default is 0.02)

preg_check_day_2.description: Pregnancy Check Day 2 (days) -- Days Since Last Heat of pregnancy check 2 (default is 60)

preg_loss_rate_2.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 2 -- % of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 1st and 2nd pregnancy check (default is 0.096)

preg_check_day_3.description: Pregnancy Check Day 3 (days) -- DCC of pregnancy check 3 (default is 172)

preg_loss_rate_3.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 3 -- The % of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 2nd and 3rd pregnancy check (default is 0.017)

methane_mitigation_method.description: Methane Mitigation Method -- The type of enteric methane mitigation supplement that is fed to the lactating dairy cattle

3-NOP_additive_amount.description: 3-NOP Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the 3-NOP mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

monensin_additive_amount.description: Monensin Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the monensin mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

essential_oils_additive_amount.description: Essential Oils Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the essential oils mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

seaweed_additive_amount.description: Seaweed Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the seaweed mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

manure_management_scenario.description: Manure Management Scenarios -- Add as many different manure scenarios as needed

manure_pen_id.description: Manure Pen ID -- An identification number for livestock enclosures.

manure_handling_method.description: Manure Handling Method -- Method for cleaning barn alleyways.

water_type.description: Water Type -- The type of water used for cleaning barn alleyways.

flushing_water_usage.description: Water Usage for Flushing (gal/animal/day). -- Water Usage for Flushing (gal/animal/day).

auto_scraping_water_usage.description: Water Usage for Auto Alley Scraping (gal/animal/day). -- Water Usage for Auto Alley Scraping (gal/animal/day).

manual_scraping_water_usage.description: Water Usage for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (gal/animal/day). -- Water Usage for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (gal/animal/day).

flushing_cleaning_frequency.description: Cleaning Frequency for Flushing (times/day). -- Cleaning Frequency for Flushing (times/day).

auto_scraping_cleaning_frequency.description: Cleaning Frequency for Auto Alley Scraping (times/day). -- Cleaning Frequency for Auto Alley Scraping (times/day).

manual_scraping_cleaning_frequency.description: Cleaning Frequency for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (times/day). -- Cleaning Frequency for Manual Skid Steer Scraping (times/day).

bedding_type.description: Bedding Type -- The material used for bedding pack.

amount_of_sand_used.description: Amount of Sand Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sand added.

amount_of_straw_used.description: Amount of Straw Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Straw added.

amount_of_sawdust_used.description: Amount of Sawdust Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sawdust added.

amount_of_manure_solids_used.description: Amount of Manure Solids Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Bedding added.

other_bedding_type.description: Other Bedding Type -- If selected 'other' in "Bedding Type", write bedding type here.

amount_of_other_bedding_used.description: Amount of Other Bedding Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Manure Solids added.

other_bedding_addition_frequency.description: Other Bedding Addition Frequency -- If selected 'other' in "Bedding Addition Frequency", write bedding addition frequency here.

tillage_frequency.description: Tillage Frequency (times/day). -- Turning activity of compost bedded pack (times/day).

milking_center_water_usage.description: Milking Center Water Usage (gal/animal/day) -- The rate of water usage for cleaning in the milking parlor (gal/animal/day).

milking_center_water_type.description: Milking Center Water Type -- The type of water used for cleaning in the milking parlor.

holding_center_water_usage.description: Holding Center Water Usage (gal/animal/day) -- The rate of water usage for cleaning in the holding area (gal/animal/day).

holding_center_water_type.description: Holding Center Water Type -- The type of water used for cleaning in the holding area.

sprinkler_water_usage.description: Sprinkler Water Usage (gal/animal/day) -- The rate of water usage for the sprinklers (gal/animal/day).

is_sprinkler_water_usage_animal_dependen.description: Is Sprinkler Water Usage animal dependent? -- Whether the sprinkler water usage varies according to the animal type.

is_sprinkler_water_usage_calc_on_yearly_.description: Is Sprinkler Water Usage calculated on a yearly basis? -- Whether the sprinkler water usage is calculated on a yearly basis.

bedding_type.description: Bedding Type -- The material used for bedding pack.

amount_of_straw_used.description: Amount of Straw Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Straw added.

amount_of_sawdust_used.description: Amount of Sawdust Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sawdust added.

amount_of_compost_used.description: Amount of Compost Used (kg/animal/day) -- Average amount of Sand added.

tillage_frequency.description: Tillage Frequency (times/day). -- Turning activity of compost bedded pack (times/day).

manure_treatment_methods.description: Manure Treatment Methods -- Select the Manure Treatment Methods.

other_manure_treatment_method.description: Other Manure Treatment Methods -- If 'other' is selected in "Manure Treatment Methods", write manure treatment method here.

manure_removal_frequency_for_storage_und.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "slurry_storage_underfloor" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when storing in slurry pit under floor (months).

manure_removal_frequency_for_storage_out.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "slurry_storage_outdoor" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when storing in slurry pit outdoor (months).

manure_removal_frequency_for_composting.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "composting" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when composting bedded pack (months).

manure_removal_frequency_for_open_lots.description: Manure Removal Frequency for "open_lots" (months) -- The frequency to remove manure when storing in open lots (months).

effluent_removal_frequency.description: Effluent Removal Frequency (months) -- The frequency to remove effluent for "anaerobic_lagoon" (months).

sludge_removal_frequency.description: Sludge Removal Frequency (years) -- The frequency to remove sludge for "anaerobic_lagoon" (years).

manure_separator_type.description: Manure Separator Type -- The type of solid-liquid separator equipment to separate coarse fibrous solids/sand

other_manure_separator.description: Other Manure Separator -- If selected 'other' in "Manure Separator Type", write manure separator type here

fraction_of_sand_removed.description: Fraction of Sand Removed for "sand_lane" -- Fraction of Sand Removed for "sand_lane".

dry_solids_percentage_for_screw_press.description: Dry Solids Percentage for "screw_press" -- Final dry solids percentage for "screw_press".

dry_solids_percentage_for_rotary_screen.description: Dry Solids Percentage for "rotary_screen" -- Final dry solids percentage for "rotary_screen".

dry_solids_percentage_for_sand_lane.description: Dry  Solids  Percentage  for  "sand_lane" -- Final dry solids percentage for "sand_lane".

total_solids_removal_efficiency_for_scre.description: Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

total_solids_removal_efficiency_for_rota.description: Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

total_solids_removal_efficiency_for_sand.description: Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Total Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

volatile_solids_removal_efficiency_for_s.description: Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

volatile_solids_removal_efficiency_for_r.description: Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

volatile_solids_removal_efficiency_for_s.description: Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Volatile Solids Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

nitrogen_removal_efficiency_for_screw_pr.description: Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

nitrogen_removal_efficiency_for_rotary_s.description: Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

nitrogen_removal_efficiency_for_sand_lan.description: Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

total_ammoniacal_nitrogen_removal_effici.description: Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".
Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".
Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Total Ammoniacal Nitrogen Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

phosphorus_removal_efficiency_for_screw_.description: Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

phosphorus_removal_efficiency_for_rotary.description: Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "rotary_screen" -- Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

phosphorus_removal_efficiency_for_sand_l.description: Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "sand_lane" -- Phosphorus Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".

potassium_removal_efficiency_for_screw_p.description: Potassium Removal Efficiency for "screw_press" -- Potassium Removal Efficiency for "screw_press".
